patterns.message: Melt-freeze crust Day 6: Day 0°C / Night -3°C with 59cm base. Expect firm/icy morning, softening afternoon.
Close to cold snap Day 8: 6°C drop to -5°C (needs >5°C drop below -5°C).
Cold snap Day 16: 8°C drop to -12°C. Great for powder preservation.
